description: Letter from Yosef b. Shemarya, the dayyan of Barqa, in Alexandria, to “his brother” Nahray b. Nissim, in Fustat. Mentioning his pilgrimage to Jerusalem from Egypt and that he is unable to travel by sea. Written ca. 1060. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:586, 4:242, 439.) EMS. There is a translation into English in Goitein's attached notes.
